heading: Examination of and enforcement actions against financial institutions subject to standards for designated activities
label: 5467 Examination of and enforcement actions against financial institutions subject to standards for designated activities

children.text: The nature and scope of the designated activities engaged in by the financial institution.
The financial and operational risks the designated activities engaged in by the financial institution may pose to the safety and soundness of the financial institution.
The financial and operational risks the designated activities engaged in by the financial institution may pose to other financial institutions, critical markets, or the broader financial system.
The resources available to and the capabilities of the financial institution to monitor and control the risks described in paragraphs (2) and (3).
The financial institution’s compliance with this subchapter and the rules and orders prescribed under .section 5464(a) of this title

children.heading: Enforcement
children.label: b Enforcement
children.text: For purposes of enforcing the provisions of this subchapter, and the rules and orders prescribed under this section, a financial institution subject to the standards prescribed under for a designated activity shall be subject to, and the appropriate financial regulator shall have authority under the provisions of subsections (b) through (n) of in the same manner and to the same extent as if the financial institution was an insured depository institution and the appropriate financial regulator was the appropriate Federal banking agency for such insured depository institution.section 5464(a) of this title1section 1818 of this titleSo in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1

children.heading: Technical assistance
children.label: c Technical assistance
children.text: The Board of Governors shall consult with and provide such technical assistance as may be required by the appropriate financial regulators to ensure that the rules and orders prescribed under this subchapter are interpreted and applied in as consistent and uniform a manner as practicable.

children.heading: Request to Board of Governors
children.label: A Request to Board of Governors
i
children.text: this subchapter; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the rules or orders prescribed under this subchapter.

children.heading: Examination by Board of Governors
children.label: B Examination by Board of Governors
children.text: Upon receipt of an appropriate written request, the Board of Governors will conduct the examination under such terms and conditions to which the Board of Governors and the appropriate financial regulator mutually agree.

children.heading: Request to Board of Governors
children.label: A Request to Board of Governors
children.text: The appropriate financial regulator may request the Board of Governors to enforce this subchapter or the rules or orders prescribed under this subchapter against a financial institution that is subject to the standards prescribed under for a designated activity.section 5464(a) of this title

children.heading: Enforcement by Board of Governors
children.label: B Enforcement by Board of Governors
children.text: Upon receipt of an appropriate written request, the Board of Governors shall determine whether an enforcement action is warranted, and, if so, it shall enforce compliance with this subchapter or the rules or orders prescribed under this subchapter and, if so, the financial institution shall be subject to, and the Board of Governors shall have authority under the provisions of subsections (b) through (n) of in the same manner and to the same extent as if the financial institution was an insured depository institution and the Board of Governors was the appropriate Federal banking agency for such insured depository institution.1section 1818 of this title

children.heading: Back-up authority of the Board of Governors
children.label: e Back-up authority of the Board of Governors
A
children.text: conduct an examination of the type described in subsection (a) of any financial institution that is subject to the standards prescribed under for a designated activity; andsection 5464(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: enforce the provisions of this subchapter or any rules or orders prescribed under this subchapter against any financial institution that is subject to the standards prescribed under for a designated activity.section 5464(a) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: reasonable cause to believe that a financial institution is not in compliance with this subchapter or the rules or orders prescribed under this subchapter with respect to a designated activity;

children.label: ii
children.text: notified, in writing, the appropriate financial regulator and the Council of its belief under clause (i) with supporting documentation included;

children.label: iii
children.text: requested the appropriate financial regulator to conduct a prompt examination of the financial institution;

children.label: I
children.text: not been afforded a reasonable opportunity to participate in an examination of the financial institution by the appropriate financial regulator within 30 days after the date of the Board’s notification under clause (ii); or

children.label: II
children.text: reasonable cause to believe that the financial institution’s noncompliance with this subchapter or the rules or orders prescribed under this subchapter poses a substantial risk to other financial institutions, critical markets, or the broader financial system, subject to the Board of Governors affording the appropriate financial regulator a reasonable opportunity to participate in the examination; and

children.label: v
children.text: obtained the approval of the Council upon an affirmative vote by a majority of the Council.

children.label: i
children.text: reasonable cause to believe that a financial institution is not in compliance with this subchapter or the rules or orders prescribed under this subchapter with respect to a designated activity;

children.label: ii
children.text: notified, in writing, the appropriate financial regulator and the Council of its belief under clause (i) with supporting documentation included and with a recommendation that the appropriate financial regulator take 1 or more specific enforcement actions against the financial institution;

children.label: I
children.text: not been notified, in writing, by the appropriate financial regulator of the commencement of an enforcement action recommended by the Board of Governors against the financial institution within 60 days from the date of the notification under clause (ii); or

children.label: II
children.text: reasonable cause to believe that the financial institution’s noncompliance with this subchapter or the rules or orders prescribed under this subchapter poses significant liquidity, credit, operational, or other risks to the financial markets or to the financial stability of the United States, subject to the Board of Governors notifying the appropriate financial regulator of the Board’s enforcement action; and

children.label: iv
children.text: obtained the approval of the Council upon an affirmative vote by a majority of the Council.

children.heading: Enforcement provisions
children.label: 3 Enforcement provisions
children.text: For purposes of taking enforcement action under paragraph (1), the financial institution shall be subject to, and the Board of Governors shall have authority under the provisions of subsections (b) through (n) of in the same manner and to the same extent as if the financial institution was an insured depository institution and the Board of Governors was the appropriate Federal banking agency for such insured depository institution.1section 1818 of this title
